rationale: The cited paper is not just topically adjacent: both notes emphasize contingent effects in financial risk taking and a mediation via attention to upside potential (cited: gender × issue capability; citing: political identity × self-efficacy). That overlap suggests the 2008 paper could be a substantive mechanism/theory precedent rather than a perfunctory background mention. With only a DOI match and no in-text snippet, it is still not safe to treat this as an obvious mention-only citation.
